phrases.intent_en: Ask where to enter with summit tickets
phrases.text_local: Où est l'entrée pour les billets sommet, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lan-TRAY poor lay bee-YAY so-MAY, seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: Ticket holders are often routed by ticket type (stairs vs elevator, summit vs 2nd floor). Check your slot time before joining a queue.

responses.english: The entrance for the summit is this way. Follow the signs for the elevator.
responses.phonetic: lan-TRAY poor leh so-MAY eh par ee-SEE. swee-VAY lay pah-NOH poor la-san-SUHR
responses.local: L'entrée pour le sommet est par ici. Suivez les panneaux pour l'ascenseur.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if this line is for security screening
phrases.text_local: Cette file est pour le contrôle de sécurité ?
phrases.pronunciation: set feel eh poor leh kon-TROHL duh say-kew-ree-TAY
phrases.cultural_note: Security screening happens before tower access. Keep metal items easy to remove to move faster.

responses.english: Yes, this is the security check. Prepare your metal objects.
responses.phonetic: wee, say-SEE leh kon-TROHL. pray-pay-Ray zoh-zhay may-tah-LEEK
responses.local: Oui, c'est ici le contrôle. Préparez vos objets métalliques.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how long the wait is
phrases.text_local: Il y a combien de temps d'attente ?
phrases.pronunciation: eel yah kom-BYAN duh tahn dah-TONT
phrases.cultural_note: Peak waits are usually midday and sunset. Early morning or late evening is often smoother.

responses.english: About twenty to thirty minutes right now.
responses.phonetic: on-VYEHR van-tront mee-NOOT ahn suh moh-MON
responses.local: Environ vingt-trente minutes en ce moment.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the elevator to the summit is
phrases.text_local: Où est l'ascenseur pour le sommet ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh la-san-SUHR poor leh so-MAY
phrases.cultural_note: Not every elevator path goes directly to the summit. Follow the staff signs by ticket type.

responses.english: The elevator to the summit is on the second floor, this way.
responses.phonetic: la-san-SUHR poor leh so-MAY eh oh day-ZYEM ay-TAZH, par ee-SEE
responses.local: L'ascenseur pour le sommet est au deuxième étage, par ici.

phrases.intent_en: Ask to book a timed slot for later
phrases.text_local: Je peux réserver un créneau pour plus tard ?
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh puh ray-zair-VAY uhn cray-NOH poor ploo TAR
phrases.cultural_note: Timed-entry slots can sell out fast, especially weekends. Booking ahead reduces queue friction.

responses.english: I can put you on the waiting list, but slots are limited.
responses.phonetic: zhuh puh voo may-TRAY sur lah leest dah-TONT, may lay cray-NOH son lay-mee-TAY
responses.local: Je peux vous mettre sur la liste d'attente, mais les créneaux sont limitées.
